name: relay
description: Coordinate asynchronously through GitHub-native Discussions, Issues, pull requests, reviews, and merge protection, following the Accord memory model (ADR-100). Launch records a verified default workspace and initializes its PR-attested identity roster; report resolves destination and recipient before Issue-default routing. The remaining daily verbs surface native obligations, reply with baton flips, preserve cited understanding, and settle with authority; an explicit migration bridge preserves legacy provenance. Language-agnostic.
